finding_results.notes: Reworked Ravi's pressure speech with broken starts and self-correction ("still—still", "No, I did hear what I wanted", "Anika, I—") and added a clear control -> regret/apology -> command oscillation.
Kept Priya's formal boundary script unchanged while recasting Anika's text into child-specific concrete stakes (shin pain, no court trip, school logistics) with distinct rhythm and register.

summary: Implemented dialogue/idiolect/cadence revisions for chapter 13 by destabilizing Ravi's confrontation syntax under pressure and restoring voice separation between Priya's formal mediator language and Anika's concrete child-stress messaging while preserving continuity and chapter spine beats.
